cc:Work.dc:title: Tray - TrayLayout
cc:Work.dc:description:
Generate a typetray from a layout file.
This is a two step process. This is step 2. Edit the layout text graphics to adjust your tray. Put in the sizes for each column and row. You can replace the hyphens and vertical bars representing the walls with a space character to remove the walls. You can replace the space characters representing the floor by a "X" to remove the floor for this compartment.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes TrayLayout --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --Lid_handle=none --Lid_style=none --Lid_handle_height=8.0 --Lid_height=4.0 --Lid_play=0.1 --h=50 --hi=0.0 --outside=0 '--sx=35*6' --sy=50:20:10 '--layout= ,> 35.00mm
 | ,> 35.00mm
 | | ,> 35.00mm
 | | | ,> 35.00mm
 | | | | ,> 35.00mm
 | | | | | ,> 35.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
| | | | 50.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
| | | 20.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
| | 10.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
' --thickness=3 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes TrayLayout --h=50 --outside=0 '--sx=35*6' --sy=50:20:10 '--layout= ,> 35.00mm
 | ,> 35.00mm
 | | ,> 35.00mm
 | | | ,> 35.00mm
 | | | | ,> 35.00mm
 | | | | | ,> 35.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
| | | | 50.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
| | | 20.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
| | 10.00mm
+-+-+-+-+-+-+
' --spacing=0.5 Url:
